Momo Yaoyorozu - Kidnapped For Ransom
Momo Yaoyorozu was a talented student at U.A. High School, training to become a hero. She had long black hair, usually tied back, and a thoughtful personality. She was tall and graceful and was known for her calm and kind nature. One evening, as she was walking home from school, she was suddenly ambushed by a group of men. They targeted her because she was the daughter of a wealthy family, hoping to make a large ransom. Momo was taken to an abandoned warehouse, where they kept her tied up, waiting for her family to pay for her release.
